SEARCH
Package de.uka.ilkd.key.symbolic_execution.model

Interface IExecutionLoopStatement

All Superinterfaces:
IExecutionBlockStartNode<LoopStatement>, IExecutionElement, IExecutionNode<LoopStatement>
All Known Implementing Classes:
ExecutionLoopStatement, ExecutionNodeReader.KeYlessLoopStatement
public interface IExecutionLoopStatement extends IExecutionBlockStartNode<LoopStatement>

A node in the symbolic execution tree which represents a loop. e.g. while(x >= 0). The loop condition (x >= 0) itself is represented as IExecutionLoopCondition instance.

The default implementation is ExecutionLoopStatement which is instantiated via a SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder instance.

See Also:
  • SymbolicExecutionTreeBuilder
  • ExecutionLoopStatement
